title: Solitary Sentinel at Midnight
caption: A single figure crossing Shibuya intersection long after the crowds have dispersed.
story: At 2 AM, the busiest pedestrian crossing in the world falls quiet. A solitary figure carrying a dark umbrella crosses under the quiet glow of lingering billboards.
curatorNote: Mysterious, lonely mood contrast. Strong narrative storytelling element.
altText: A lonely pedestrian with an umbrella crossing an empty city intersection at night under glowing billboards.
